scripts.prebuild: test -d packages/shared-3d/dist || (cd packages/shared-3d && npm run build)
scripts.test:with-backend: npm run --prefix .. test:setup:backend && npm run test
scripts.test:e2e:with-setup: npm run --prefix .. test:setup:frontend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:docker: TEST_ENVIRONMENT=docker BASE_URL=http://localhost:3007 API_URL=http://localhost:3006/api npm --prefix e2e run test
scripts.test:e2e:docker:headed: TEST_ENVIRONMENT=docker BASE_URL=http://localhost:3007 API_URL=http://localhost:3006/api npm --prefix e2e run test:headed
scripts.test:e2e:docker:integration: TEST_ENVIRONMENT=docker BASE_URL=http://localhost:3007 API_URL=http://localhost:3006/api npm --prefix e2e run test:integration
scripts.test:e2e:docker:smoke: TEST_ENVIRONMENT=docker BASE_URL=http://localhost:3007 API_URL=http://localhost:3006/api npm --prefix e2e run test:smoke
scripts.test:e2e:docker:ui: TEST_ENVIRONMENT=docker BASE_URL=http://localhost:3007 API_URL=http://localhost:3006/api npm --prefix e2e run test:ui
scripts.check:deprecated: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path='package-lock.json'; if(!fs.existsSync(path)){console.log('No package-lock.json found.'); process.exit(0);} const lock=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8')); const deprecated=Object.entries(lock.packages||{}).filter(([,info])=>info.deprecated); if(!deprecated.length){console.log('No deprecated packages.'); process.exit(0);} deprecated.forEach(([name,info])=>{const pkg=name.replace(/^node_modules\//,''); console.log(pkg + ': ' + info.deprecated);}); process.exit(1);"
